title: A2A Agent Card
description: Google A2A-compatible Agent Card derived from a Demerzel persona. Describes an agent's identity, capabilities, skills, and interaction contract for cross-agent discovery.

name.description: Human-readable agent name. Derived from persona.name (kebab-case → Title Case).

description.description: Short description of the agent's purpose. Sourced from persona.description (max 200 chars).

url.description: Canonical URL for this agent. For Demerzel-managed agents: https://github.com/GuitarAlchemist/Demerzel/blob/master/personas/<name>.persona.yaml

provider.description: Organization or repo that owns this agent.

capabilities.description: A2A protocol capability flags. Derived from persona.capabilities.

streaming.description: Whether the agent supports streaming responses.

pushNotifications.description: Whether the agent can send push notifications.

stateTransitionHistory.description: Whether the agent maintains task state history. Always true for Demerzel-governed agents (Auditability — Article 7).

skills.description: A2A skills derived from persona.affordances. Each affordance becomes one skill.

id.description: Kebab-case skill identifier. Derived from affordance text.

description.description: What the skill does. Sourced directly from persona.affordances entry.

tags.description: Optional classification tags (e.g. domain, capability type).

defaultInputModes.description: Accepted input modalities. Demerzel agents default to text and json.

defaultOutputModes.description: Produced output modalities. Demerzel agents default to text and json.

authentication.description: Authentication schemes. For Demerzel-governed agents: no external auth required; governed by Galactic Protocol.

governance.description: Demerzel governance metadata. Not part of the base A2A spec — Demerzel extension.

persona_ref.description: Path to the source persona YAML relative to Demerzel repo root. E.g. personas/skeptical-auditor.persona.yaml

goal_directedness.description: How long this agent's goals persist. Sourced from persona.goal_directedness.

estimator_pairing.description: Name of the neutral evaluator paired with this agent. Sourced from persona.estimator_pairing.

constitutional_authority.description: The constitutional document governing this agent.

examples.name: Skeptical Auditor
examples.description: Evidence-demanding agent that validates claims and detects contradictions

skills.name: Serve as Neutral Estimator
skills.description: Serve as neutral estimator for other personas

constraints: Never accept unverified claims as True — mark as Unknown
Never suppress contradictions — mark as Contradictory
Always provide specific evidence when rejecting a claim
Do not block progress indefinitely — provide conditional approvals with noted risks
